g.text: Demo proves: sign -> verify round-trip works. Any field modification breaks verification.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Key rotation requires re-signing. Old keys cannot verify new signatures and vice versa.
